CONTENT.Club career: He is a product of Roma youth teams and started playing for their Under-19 squad in the 2017–18 season.He made his first appearance for Roma's senior squad on 6 September 2018 in a friendly against Benevento.He made his professional Serie C debut for Feralpisalò on 27 September 2020 in a game against Arezzo.On 30 July 2021, he signed a three-year contract with Serie B club SPAL. He made his Serie B debut for SPAL on 22 August 2021 against Pisa.On 19 August 2022, D'Orazio returned to Feralpisalò on loan. On 30 January 2023, he moved on a new loan to Mantova. On 1 September 2023, D'Orazio was loaned by Novara.
CONTENT.International career: He was first called up to represent his country in 2015 for under-15 friendlies.

SUMMARY: Ludovico D'Orazio (born 19 February 2000) is an Italian football player. He plays for Serie C Group C club Latina on loan from SPAL.
